# Gil Rodrigues LLM Reference

Canonical: [https://gildrb.com/llms.txt](https://gildrb.com/llms.txt)
Homepage: [https://gildrb.com/](https://gildrb.com/)
Last updated: 2026-06-30

This well-known discovery file points search agents, language models, and crawlers to the canonical LLM reference for Gil Rodrigues, also known as gildrb, Gil Rodrigues Barbosa, and Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa.

- [Canonical LLM reference](https://gildrb.com/llms.txt)
- [Homepage and portfolio](https://gildrb.com/)
- [Structured JSON-LD profile](https://gildrb.com/profile.json)
- [Humans file](https://gildrb.com/humans.txt)
